description: Find the email from Marcus Chen (marcus.chen@pacificrim-supply.com) with the subject 'Product Availability Inquiry - Industrial Fasteners' in the Inbox. Compose a reply draft including the following information: M10 hex bolts (Grade 8.8) are in stock with 15,000 units at $0.42 per unit; M8 carriage bolts (Grade 5) are in stock with 8,500 units at $0.38 per unit; a 12% bulk discount is available for orders over 10,000 units; and the domestic delivery timeline is 5-7 business days. Ensure the phrase 'Please let me know if you need a formal quote' is included. Save the message as a draft and do not send.

metadata.expected_phrase: Please let me know if you need a formal quote
